name: RAG Active Call - Phase 2 Full Happy Path

assignments.name: user_query
assignments.value: How does the partnership interview at Meta work, and do I need technical examples for it?

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO rag_transactions (
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  incoming_message_ts,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.discord_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_name }}',
  '{{ $json.author_id_hash }}',
  now(),
  'active_call',
  'created',
  'not_started',
  'not_started',
  '{{ $json.user_query }}'
)
RETURNING
  transaction_id,
  created_at,
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES
(
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'discord.event_received',
  'Set Manual Active Call',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'discord_message_id', '{{ $json.discord_message_id }}',
    'channel_id', '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
    'channel_name', '{{ $json.channel_name }}'
  )
),
(
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'routing.active_call',
  'Create Transaction',
  'decision',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'route_type', '{{ $json.route_type }}',
    'reason', 'manual_phase_2_full_happy_path_test'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = 'retrieving',
  retrieval_status = 'not_started',
  normalized_query = '{{ $json.normalized_query }}'
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}';

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'query.normalized',
  'Normalize Query',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'normalized_query', '{{ $json.normalized_query }}',
    'query_prefix', 'search_query:'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { vector: $json.query_vector, limit: $json.top_k, with_payload: true, with_vector: false } }}

parameters.query:
WITH rows AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ $json.retrieval_results_sql_json }}'::jsonb)
  AS x(
    qdrant_point_id text,
    rank integer,
    retrieval_score double precision,
    channel_id text,
    channel_name text,
    thread_name text,
    first_message_id text,
    message_ids text[],
    start_ts timestamptz,
    end_ts timestamptz,
    payload jsonb
  )
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO rag_retrieval_results (
    transaction_id,
    qdrant_point_id,
    rank,
    retrieval_score,
    channel_id,
    channel_name,
    thread_name,
    first_message_id,
    message_ids,
    start_ts,
    end_ts,
    payload
  )
  SELECT
    '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
    qdrant_point_id,
    rank,
    retrieval_score,
    channel_id,
    channel_name,
    thread_name,
    first_message_id,
    message_ids,
    start_ts,
    end_ts,
    payload
  FROM rows
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'::uuid AS transaction_id, count(*) AS inserted_count
FROM inserted;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.transaction_id }}',
  '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.should_generate ? "qdrant.query_completed" : "qdrant.no_context" }}',
  'Qdrant Vector Search',
  'decision',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'qdrant_collection', '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.qdrant_collection }}',
    'embedding_ok', {{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.embedding_ok }},
    'qdrant_status_code', {{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.qdrant_status_code || 0 }},
    'raw_candidate_count', {{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.raw_candidate_count || 0 }},
    'passed_candidate_count', {{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.passed_candidate_count || 0 }},
    'selected_context_count', {{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.selected_context_count || 0 }},
    'retrieval_score_threshold', {{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.retrieval_score_threshold || 0 }},
    'min_result_count', {{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.min_result_count || 0 }},
    'refusal_reason', '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.refusal_reason }}'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $items('Build Retrieval Decision')[0].json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, maxOutputTokens: 800 } } }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = 'answered',
  retrieval_status = 'context_found',
  response_status = CASE WHEN {{ ($json.statusCode || $json.status || 0) >= 200 && ($json.statusCode || $json.status || 0) < 300 }} THEN 'posted' ELSE 'failed' END,
  discord_response_message_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.body.id }}', ''),
  refusal_reason = NULL,
  completed_at = now(),
  latency_ms = GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at))::int * 1000)
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $items("Build Answer Response")[0].json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING transaction_id, status, retrieval_status, response_status, refusal_reason, discord_response_message_id, latency_ms;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = 'refused',
  retrieval_status = '{{ $items("Build Refusal Response")[0].json.retrieval_status }}',
  response_status = CASE WHEN {{ ($json.statusCode || $json.status || 0) >= 200 && ($json.statusCode || $json.status || 0) < 300 }} THEN 'posted' ELSE 'failed' END,
  discord_response_message_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.body.id }}', ''),
  refusal_reason = '{{ $items("Build Refusal Response")[0].json.refusal_reason }}',
  completed_at = now(),
  latency_ms = GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at))::int * 1000)
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $items("Build Refusal Response")[0].json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING transaction_id, status, retrieval_status, response_status, refusal_reason, discord_response_message_id, latency_ms;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'transaction.phase_2_completed',
  'Finalize Transaction',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'status', '{{ $json.status }}',
    'retrieval_status', '{{ $json.retrieval_status }}',
    'response_status', '{{ $json.response_status }}',
    'refusal_reason', '{{ $json.refusal_reason }}',
    'discord_response_message_id', '{{ $json.discord_response_message_id }}',
    'latency_ms', {{ $json.latency_ms || 0 }}
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

SELECT
  transaction_id,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  refusal_reason,
  discord_response_message_id,
  user_query,
  normalized_query,
  created_at,
  completed_at,
  latency_ms
FROM rag_transactions
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}';

SELECT
  event_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload,
  created_at
FROM rag_trace_events
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;
